name_en: 【Genuine Leather】LE 37 Small Glossy Leather Bag New Arrival, Super Cute Bucket Bag with Handle_New Shape, made of Italian calfskin. The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. It has metal studs at the bottom and a classic iconic metal logo insert clasp. The overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish!
name_cn:

The overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish!
Size: 17×20×13cm
Model: 749036~~168660
